ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hardware_parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware part */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the Intel Tofino hardware */,
  "pipes" INTEGER /* Number of pipes in the hardware part */,
  "packet_buffer" INTEGER /* Size of the packet buffer in MBytes */,
  "front_panel_100GE_ports" INTEGER /* Number of 100GE front panel ports */,
  "front_panel_25GE_ports" INTEGER /* Number of 25GE front panel ports */,
  "part_model" TEXT /* Model name of the part */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the part was manufactured */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each part */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version installed on the part */,
  "product_line" TEXT /* Product line to which the part belongs */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the part in grams */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the part (width, height, depth) in millimeters */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption in watts */,
  "thermal_dissipation" REAL /* Thermal dissipation in watts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware part */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part currently in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity before a reorder is necessary */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the part was last restocked */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory */,
  "last_inventory_check" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  "next_inventory_check" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inventory check */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the part */,
  "purchase_order_number" TEXT /* Purchase order number for the part */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the next order */,
  "last_supplier" TEXT /* Name of the last supplier who supplied the part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES hardware_parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware part */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric being measured */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data */,
  "metric_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES hardware_parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware part */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance task */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance activity in minutes */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES hardware_parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compatibility" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary hardware part */,
  "compatible_part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compatible hardware part */,
  "compatibility_type" TEXT /* Type of compatibility */,
  "compatibility_description" TEXT /* Description of the compatibility relationship */,
  "compatibility_status" TEXT /* Status of the compatibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_compatible_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("compatible_part_id") REFERENCES hardware_parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES hardware_parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware part related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was recorded */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES hardware_parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for orders from the supplier in days */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the order */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware part being ordered */,
  "order_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "order_total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date for the order */,
  "shipped_by" TEXT /* Name of the shipping company */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES hardware_parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware part being purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "purchase_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity purchased */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit during the purchase */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the purchase */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES hardware_parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranty_records" (
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware part */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Duration of the warranty in months */,
  "warranty_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the warranty */,
  "warranty_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the warranty */,
  "warranty_type" TEXT /* Type of warranty */,
  "warranty_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the warranty */,
  "warranty_status" TEXT /* Status of the warranty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warranty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_records_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES hardware_parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was issued */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* Sender of the notification */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value assigned to the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the setting */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was last modified */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
